P1.description: Daily-driver chain went blind today — holiday-unaware staleness guard false-aborted the screeners, cascading to skip dashboard publish AND system_doctor.

P2.description: GENERATORS/ is 72% dead scratch files (323/451 underscore one-shots); recurring NUL/truncation corruption means not all writers are atomic.
Four connected finance/research plugins (bigdata.com, Daloopa, LSEG, design) are used in ZERO places in the vault — largest under-used Claude capability.

regime.headline: REGIME YELLOW holds — operator-signed 260625 (hold), score 58. Rails refreshed live: TNX eased to ~4.41% (US cash; cache 4.451) — now AT/just below the 4.45 binding gate, so the GREEN re-arm path is live but needs a SUSTAINED daily close. DXY 101.6, a fresh 15-month high pressing the 102 reduce-gate (cushion ~0.4). USDINR 94.4 holds the >94 PAUSE band. Brent 73 — war premium gone. NEW: RBI FX reserves slipped to 671.6B, BELOW the 680 WATCH floor (was 681.6 at the 06-19 sign) — INR-side caution. Net mixed: TNX easing (favorable) offset by RBI<680 + DXY compression. Existing book HOLDS; new deploys high-conviction only.

news.headline: MTAR Tech rebounds ~13% as Wyoming data-centre (Bloom Energy fuel-cell) project confirmed on track; no order cancellations

HFCL at DAM Capital defence conference; hosts investor plant visit in Hyderabad
EMS Q4: Syrma SGS leads sector with 69% YoY growth (vs Avalon 40%, Kaynes 26%, Dixon 2%)
Dixon Q4 EMS growth just 2% on subdued mobile demand + memory-chip supply crunch
Kaynes flagged for liquidity strain — ~Rs 600cr negative FY26 cash flow on extended receivables/inventory
Bajaj Finance +5.59% led Sensex's 2.3% rally Friday (biggest daily gain since early April) on US-Iran deal optimism
Larsen & Toubro +4.87% in Friday's broad market rally
HFCL & Sterlite Tech freeze at 5% lower circuit after a massive 2026 rally (profit-booking correction)
BEL FY26 order intake ~Rs 30,000cr incl $346M exports; defence-supplier ecosystem active
HFCL board approves Rs 89.25cr HASPL investment, Rs 75cr Raddef sale, Rs 50cr TWS transfer
Supreme Court upholds Exide's red battery trade dress; restrains Amara Raja from fresh manufacturing
Paras Defence gains on bagging Rs 52.82cr electro-optics order from BEL (delivery by Sep 2027)
GMDC to set up AI-driven Rare Earth Observatory with University of Cambridge (mine-to-magnet REE intelligence)
IREDA posts record FY26 profit Rs 1,873cr (+10%); loan book +22% YoY to ~Rs 93,000cr; Rs 1.35/sh dividend
TARIL posts record Q4 FY26 revenue Rs 782.67cr (+15.7% YoY) but operating margin contracts to 15.14% (from 19.40%)

catalysts.event: Ongoing: US–Iran PEACE DEAL announced (Trump — immediate cessation on all fronts) but UNSIGNED; signing flagged for this weekend in Europe. 14-point draft reopens the Strait of Hormuz within 30d + lifts oil sanctions (Brent cracked sub-$86.5). A collapse re-spikes oil + re-arms the §10.1 correlated cascade (silver + INR + rates).
US Employment Situation (June NFP) — first Friday (Jul-4 holiday may shift release per BLS schedule).
Q1 FY27 (Apr-Jun) Indian earnings season opens — IT majors (TCS held) typically report first ~mid-July. Confirm specific board dates via NSE/BSE filings before acting (directional).
FOMC decision Jul 28-29 — second Warsh meeting; dot-plot follow-through.
RBI MPC resolution (bi-monthly, early-Aug window) — confirm exact date on RBI calendar.
US Employment Situation (July NFP) — first Friday.
US Employment Situation (Aug NFP) — first Friday.
FOMC decision Sep 15-16 — quarterly SEP / dot-plot refresh.

template.source: DR corpus (defence-railways brief); HBL IR / concall guidance
template.notes: TEMPLATE (exited). The canonical 'orders won != orders executed': fat order book + Kavach guidance, but actual ~1,452 cum route-km vs a 5,000-5,500 km/yr pace required -> execution running ~27% of the guidance-implied pace; must 3-4x. execution_pace_ratio = 1452 / 5500. Book-to-bill would look great; execution rate exposes the cliff.
